checkpoints.title: No hardcoded passwords
checkpoints.description: Source code must not contain hardcoded passwords assigned to variables. This pattern catches common assignment forms across languages.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Remove hardcoded passwords. Use environment variables (os.environ, process.env) or a secrets manager (AWS Secrets Manager, Azure Key Vault, HashiCorp Vault).

checkpoints.title: No hardcoded API keys or tokens
checkpoints.description: Source code must not contain hardcoded API keys or tokens assigned inline. This pattern catches common assignment forms.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Remove hardcoded API keys. Store them in environment variables or a secrets manager and reference them at runtime.

checkpoints.title: No hardcoded AWS access keys
checkpoints.description: Repository must not contain hardcoded AWS access key IDs. The AKIA prefix is unique to AWS access keys — this check produces virtually zero false positives.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Remove hardcoded AWS keys immediately — they may already be compromised. Use IAM roles, AWS SSO, or environment variables. Rotate the key in the AWS console.

checkpoints.title: No private key files committed
checkpoints.description: Private key files (PEM, key, cert) must not be committed to the repository.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Remove private key files from the repository. Add *.pem, *.key, id_rsa to .gitignore. If already committed, rotate the keys — they are compromised.

checkpoints.title: No .env files committed
checkpoints.description: .env files commonly contain secrets and must not be committed. They should be in .gitignore and provided at deploy time.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Remove .env files from the repository and add them to .gitignore. Provide a .env.example with placeholder values for documentation. If already committed, rotate any secrets they contained.

checkpoints.title: Dependency lock file exists
checkpoints.description: A dependency lock file pins transitive dependency versions, preventing supply chain attacks from malicious version updates.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Commit your dependency lock file. Run 'npm install', 'poetry lock', 'go mod tidy', etc. to generate it.

checkpoints.title: .gitignore covers secrets
checkpoints.description: .gitignore should contain patterns covering common secret files to prevent accidental commits.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Add secret file patterns to .gitignore: .env, *.pem, *.key, id_rsa, secrets/, credentials.json

checkpoints.title: SECURITY.md exists
checkpoints.description: Repository should have a SECURITY.md describing how to report vulnerabilities responsibly.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Add a SECURITY.md with a contact method for reporting vulnerabilities (e.g., security@yourorg.com or a private issue template).

checkpoints.title: Security review attestation
checkpoints.description: Service should have undergone a security review before launch. This attestation confirms the review occurred.
checkpoints.fix_hint: Complete a security review and attest in .readiness/external-evidence.json with attestation_key 'security_review', the reviewer's identity, and a link to the review document or ticket.
